prompt:
Men's realistic-scale variation 3 — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a fit warm-skinned man in his early 30s sitting on a low light-stone bench at a modern poolside lounge, BRIGHT CLEAN OPEN OUTDOOR DAYLIGHT (midday, soft cloud-diffused sky brightness — bright but not harsh), no harsh shadows. He casually leans one elbow on his knee, the other hand lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between his thumb and index finger toward his slightly parted lips with a relaxed half-smile, mid-bite. He wears a fitted cream linen short-sleeve button-up open over a clean white tee, sand linen drawstring shorts, simple leather watch, brown stubble, sun-warmed glowing skin.

>>> THE JAR — LIT BY CLEAN BOUNCING DAYLIGHT <<<
The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar sits on the stone bench beside him in the SAME bright open daylight. The light angle creates a SHARP CLEAN SPECULAR HIGHLIGHT — a bright vertical gleam — running down the curved side of the jar's glossy black plastic. The jar's front label catches the light fully and CRISPLY — every detail of the teal/cyan and gold/yellow brand accents reads sharply with NO shadow falloff, NO diffusion. The label IS the brightest cleanly-lit element on the bench. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also in the same bright open daylight. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible.

Background: a modern minimalist poolside — calm crystal-blue pool water in the soft-focus background, smooth stone deck, a single chaise lounge, palm fronds just out of frame. Bright clean midday daylight, soft sky brightness, NO harsh sun direction. NOT moody, NOT golden-hour, NOT dappled.

Lighting: BRIGHT CLEAN OPEN DAYLIGHT wrapping BOTH the jar AND the man uniformly — same crisp daylight bouncing cleanly off both subject's skin and the jar's glossy plastic. The pool water's soft reflected light fills any minor shadows. NO heavy shadows, NO orange tint, NO mood — just clean bright open real daylight.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the man seated, gummy held in the upper-third near his face, small realistic-sized jar visible in the lower-third with bright specular highlight clearly visible on its curved side.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture and stubble, sharp focus on jar with clean specular reflections, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers. Editorial men's wellness-brand feel.
